corrections.current: καὶ ὁ δῆμος ὁ γινώσκων ταῦτα κατισχύσουσι καὶ ποιήσουσιν.
corrections.correct: καὶ ὁ δῆμος ὁ γινώσκων ταῦτα κατισχύσουσι καὶ ποιήσουσι.

corrections.note: Chi misread as xi; printed form is συναχθήσονται.
Printed text clearly has circumflex on η: ἐκλεγῆναι.
Transcript dropped sigma and misread the ending; image reads παροργισθήσεται.
Printed text has plural future: ὑποταγήσονται.
Right-margin line number 39 was captured into the body text.

corrections.current: ὀργισθησονται 87 ÷ και επιστρ. κ. οργισθησεται Syr
corrections.correct: ÷ και επιστρεψει (superscr ÷) και οργισθησονται 87 ÷ και επιστρ. κ. οργισθησεται Syr
corrections.note: The apparatus line begins with '30 ÷ και επιστρεψει (superscr ÷) και οργισθησονται 87' before the Syriac note; this portion is omitted.
The 31-entry is 'Βδελυγμα ερημωσεως Syrmg'; transcript imported the following 37-entry instead.

corrections.correct: Μωυσεως Syrhig 37 τους θεους] τον θεον Syr
corrections.note: A preceding apparatus item 'Μωυσεως Syrhig' is present before the 37-entry and omitted from transcript.
Printed apparatus includes a closing bracket after κινησει.

notes: Running head and page number match. Body includes right-margin verse numbers in print; only the stray '39' embedded in text is erroneous. Apparatus has multiple entries on one line; transcript conflated the 31 and 37 entries.
